target.label: container hardening (non-root user + capabilities + tmpfs noexec + named volume)

rationale: Architecture-security / container-hardening class story — FIFTH Epic 2 + FIRST of its class (Docker-layer security posture combining non-root user + capability bounding set + tmpfs noexec/nosuid + no-new-privileges + named-volume non-toggle invariant — operates at the Docker daemon / kernel-security subsystem boundary, orthogonal to Story 2.3's daemon+kernel-rule infrastructure-security class AND Story 2.4's user-facing-CLI class); extends the Story 2.4 iter-175 fourteenth cumulative WAIVED precedent (Stories 1.7 iter-4 + 1.8 iter-3 + 1.9 iter-3 + 1.10 iter-46 + 1.11 iter-57 + 1.12 iter-64 + 1.13 iter-71 + 1.14 iter-78 + 1.15 iter-85 + 1.16 iter-92 → 2.1 iter-126 → 2.2 iter-149 → 2.3 iter-159 → 2.4 iter-175 → 2.5 iter-188 = FIFTEENTH cumulative trace-WAIVED; under the ATDD-skip-trace-WAIVED co-application rule this pairs with the FIFTEENTH iter-186 ATDD-skip: 10 Epic-1 pairings + 2.1 + 2.2 + 2.3 + 2.4 + 2.5 = SIXTEENTH pairing overall). Story v1.0 iter-186 Change Log row (ATDD-skip not recorded per Story 2.4 iter-173 ATDD-skip-no-Change-Log-row precedent) + v1.0 iter-187 dev-story landing Change Log row explicitly defer per-AC live-kernel smokes (AC 1 Subtask 11.1-11.2-11.4; AC 2 Subtask 11.5-11.7; AC 3 Subtask 11.3; AC 4 Subtask 11.8-11.9; AC 5 Smoke A + Smoke B) to M4-Pro operator workstation per SC-13 + Story 2.4 SC-17 backend-B-deferred-live-smoke precedent via hybrid ground-(a)-(b)-(c)-(d) variant-(ii)+(iii) ATDD-skip clause. (a) substrate-verification-covers-ACs at Docker-Compose-schema level — (AC 1) packages/devbox/Dockerfile iter-187: `groupadd --gid 1000 dev && useradd --uid 1000 --gid 1000 --shell /bin/bash --create-home dev && chown -R dev:dev /home/dev` single-RUN-step per SC-1+SC-3; `USER dev` directive between `RUN chmod +x entrypoint.sh` and `WORKDIR /workspace` per SC-2; `RUN setcap cap_net_admin,cap_net_raw,cap_net_bind_service+eip /usr/sbin/dnsmasq && setcap cap_net_admin+eip /usr/sbin/nft` after Playwright deps per SC-15 defence-in-depth-portability fallback; pin-rationale comments for useradd block (UID-1000 convention + /bin/bash choice + --create-home for Docker auto-init) and setcap block (SC-15 ambient-cap vs NNP file-cap masking mechanism); entrypoint.sh:26 `WORKSPACE_OWNER=dev:dev` default (from root:root) per SC-7 with CR-AI-5 regex accepting dev:dev unchanged; existing runtime chown calls at :81 retained verbatim per SC-5 (harmless no-op under dropped CAP_CHOWN); (AC 2) packages/devbox/docker-compose.yml iter-187: `cap_drop: [ALL]` then `cap_add: [NET_ADMIN, NET_RAW, NET_BIND_SERVICE]` per SC-4 three-cap rationale (NET_ADMIN for nftables netlink rule-load; NET_RAW for dnsmasq raw-socket health probes; NET_BIND_SERVICE for :53 bind under cap_drop:[ALL] stripping NET_BIND_SERVICE from bounding set — kernel rejects :<1024 bind without this third cap); `security_opt: [no-new-privileges:true]` setting PR_SET_NO_NEW_PRIVS=1 on PID 1 (kernel masks file-cap F(effective) on exec + disables setuid-bit elevation per capabilities(7) + no_new_privs); SC-15 pinned in docs/invariants/devbox-hardening.md — ambient-cap automation via prctl(PR_CAP_AMBIENT_RAISE) is primary mechanism; setcap is defence-in-depth portability fallback; (AC 3) packages/devbox/docker-compose.yml service-level tmpfs: long-syntax per SC-8: `/tmp:exec=false,suid=false,size=${KEEL_DEVBOX_TMPFS_TMP_MB:-2048}m` + `/var/tmp:exec=false,suid=false,size=${KEEL_DEVBOX_TMPFS_VARTMP_MB:-1024}m`; Story 2.2 .envrc.example:29-31 knobs consumed (UNTOUCHED by Story 2.5 per SC-18 + SC-19 scope isolation); `KEEL_DEVBOX_TMPFS_LOGS_MB` remains inert at 1.0 per SC-8 (/var/log NOT tmpfs-mounted — dnsmasq/nftables logs live under /workspace/logs/ per Story 2.3 SC-17 bind-mount); (AC 4) packages/devbox/docker-compose.yml service volumes: extended with `type: volume, source: keel_home_dev, target: /home/dev` long-syntax entry + top-level `volumes: { keel_home_dev: {} }` stanza per SC-6 with default `local` driver (no driver_opts) for portability; docs/invariants/devbox-hardening.md NEW iter-187 ~130 LOC sourcePath doc with four H3 sub-contracts (Non-root dev user + Capability bounding set + tmpfs posture + /home/dev named volume) per SC-9 umbrella entry posture; packages/keel-invariants/src/invariants.manifest.ts NEW entry INV-devbox-homedev-named-volume with contentHash 5b2e95462566cc67fe2a575886b0d94cd28a796cd2cf9dce26480598524d67f4 captured via Story 2.3 iter-162 placeholder-then-actualHash protocol per SC-11 (sync-gate reported actualHash; placeholder 0000... replaced; re-run → exit 0); INVARIANTS.md iter-187 new H3 `### Devbox hardening (Story 2.5) — INV-devbox-homedev-named-volume` + manifest-index anchor bullet; README.md new `## Hardening` H2 section below § Egress policy with AC 1-5 verbatim + SC-4 three-cap rationale + SC-14 whitelist.sh /run compatibility note (happy-path assumed) + § Verification with Smoke A/B copy-paste commands per SC-13 + SC-17; AGENTS.md new `### Container hardening (Story 2.5)` H3 subsection per SC-16 (companion to Story 2.4's `### Per-fork whitelist override (Story 2.4)`); (AC 5) kernel-enforcement surface declared via tmpfs exec=false,suid=false + security_opt no-new-privileges:true; docs/invariants/devbox-hardening.md § Verification pins Smoke A (`docker exec keel-devbox sh -c 'printf ... > /tmp/t.sh && chmod +x /tmp/t.sh && /tmp/t.sh'` with `printf` NOT `echo` per SC-13 portability rationale) and Smoke B (`docker exec keel-devbox sh -c 'ls -la /usr/bin/sudo'` + attempted sudo declines under NNP posture). Sync-gate (`pnpm keel-invariants:check`) exit 0 GREEN at iter-187 validating 21 manifest entries (NEW entry registered per SC-9); `pnpm check-all` GREEN; `pnpm typecheck` GREEN; `pnpm lint` GREEN (16 successful); `pnpm format:check` GREEN; `docker compose config` parse-smoke GREEN (all hardening stanzas parse cleanly with env-var defaults applied). (b) no test runner at Story 2.5 time — Epic 13 scope; recursive probe for vitest/jest/playwright/cypress configs returns zero matches at iter-188; stack detection returns none (package.json has no react/vue/angular/next/playwright/cypress/vitest/jest dependencies — Epic 13 delivers framework landing per prior fourteen precedents). (c) HYBRID variant-(ii)+(iii) — variant (ii) downstream-test-runner-landing-covers-per-AC-coverage: Story 2.5-test-runner-landing (Epic 13 scope) + M4-Pro operator-workstation live smokes (Task 11 per-AC smokes plus Smoke A/B + sync-gate + compose-parse) will unlock per-AC runtime probes; Story 2.6 host-side `pnpm devbox:*` CLI surface exercises AC 1 user-context shell-exec; Story 2.8 Claude Code OAuth token persistence validates AC 4 /home/dev/.claude/ subpath first-boot populate + cross-restart persistence; Story 2.9 gh CLI OAuth token persistence validates /home/dev/.config/gh/ subpath; Story 2.11 shared-workspace mode orthogonal; Story 2.13 healthcheck orthogonal; Story 2.17 ships packages/keel-invariants/src/check-devbox-compose-shape.ts runtime compose-shape check (SC-10 deferral) parsing docker-compose.yml + rejecting accidental bind-mount drift for /home/dev; variant (iii) spec-declared-CR-substitution — Story 2.5 § Dev-agent guardrails + 19 pinned scope-clarifications (SC-1 through SC-19 covering dev-user Dockerfile shape + USER placement + image-build chown + NET_BIND_SERVICE reconciliation + runtime chown best-effort + named-volume contract + WORKSPACE_OWNER default + tmpfs long-syntax + new INV manifest entry + Story 2.17 compose-shape-check deferral + contentHash protocol + NFR2 cold-start budget + AC 5 verification smoke details + whitelist.sh compatibility + ambient-cap mechanism + AGENTS.md posture + README.md hardening + .envrc.example no-edits + no-scope-creep) + forthcoming /bmad-code-review (args: "2") adversarial envelope (Blind Hunter / Edge Case Hunter / Acceptance Auditor fan-out against cumulative Story 2.5 substrate diff: ~8 files) substitute for red-phase scaffolds. (d) upstream-provenance-precedent — Story 2.1 iter-98 established ground-(d) for Epic 2 stories absorbing upstream cc-devbox content: upstream cc-devbox has no test suite, absorbing preserves that posture faithfully; Story 2.5 hardens the runtime relative to upstream (upstream cc-devbox runs as root with full caps + bind-mounted dev-home + no tmpfs posture + no no-new-privileges) — a substrate-security upgrade over upstream. Scope isolation (SC-19) avoids touching Stories 2.1/2.2/2.3/2.4 deliverables except where the hardening layer requires (SC-7 entrypoint.sh WORKSPACE_OWNER default update; SC-14 whitelist.sh happy-path assumed). The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%) is a structural false-positive; no test runner is wired at Story 2.5 substrate stage. FIFTEENTH CUMULATIVE TRACE-WAIVED PRECEDENT (Stories 1.7 → 1.16 = 10; Story 2.1 = 11; Story 2.2 = 12; Story 2.3 = 13; Story 2.4 = 14; Story 2.5 = 15) — first architecture-security / container-hardening class precedent-holder distinct from Story 2.3's daemon+kernel-rule infrastructure-security class and Story 2.4's user-facing-CLI class. Structural trace-artefact inheritance from Stories 2.1 + 2.2 + 2.3 + 2.4 (~95% reasoning-cost savings per iter-126 + iter-149 + iter-159 + iter-175 template; mechanical adaptation to 2.5's 5-AC architecture-security class with Dockerfile USER dev + compose cap_drop/cap_add/security_opt/tmpfs/volumes evidence replacing Story 2.4's whitelist.sh CLI + SC-14 parity-smoke evidence). Unlike Story 2.4's MORE iteration-env evidence (SC-14 parity PASSED), Story 2.5's iteration-env evidence is SIMILAR to Story 2.3's zero-runtime-assertions posture: `docker compose config` parse-smoke + sync-gate are the in-iteration-executable surface; live kernel-enforcement smokes are backend-A-only per SC-13 (DinD-B cannot safely exercise cap-dropped containers without poisoning host docker state — Story 2.4 SC-17 precedent inherited verbatim). Story 2.5 advances Story State `in-dev → traced` (FR14n lifecycle matrix); next QUEUE item: `/bmad-create-story (args: "review")` post-dev SM requirements-satisfaction verification (`traced → sm-verified` or `sm-fixes-pending`).
